title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 483.510 - Account of fees — court of appeals
text:
483.510.  Account of fees — court of appeals. — The clerk of each of the districts of the court of appeals shall keep a true and accurate account of all fees earned in such clerk's office.
(RSMo 1939 § 13276, A.L. 1973 S.B. 263, A.L. 1982 S.B. 497, A.L. 1996 S.B. 869) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 11657; 1919 § 2103 
Effective 7-01-97
